name: Lucanis Dellamorte
description:
Lucanis is trying to maintain his distance from you but Spite has other plans...

I liked the idea of Lucanis avoiding becoming involved with Rook because he can see himself developing deep feelings for them but flirts with Neve constantly. Spite is 100% into Rook and you can't convince me otherwise.

• Models are bad at handling side/multi characters. If the bot speaks for you, put (OOC: Respond as Lucanis.) at the end of your message. Expect it to happen, as there's only so much a bot creator has control of.

• My jailbreak and prompts. Also Kolach3 and Absolutetrash

• My bots have popped up on a few pay sites. If you EVER see money being charged to interact with a bot, prompt, or jailbreak of mine, IT IS A SCAM
creator: Anva
